headline: Marathon Petroleum’s ESG Recognition Meets Tightening Jet Fuel Market Opportunity
summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) has received a top quartile ESG ranking and inclusion in the Dow Jones Best in Class Indices for sustainability leadership. The company is positioned to benefit from tighter global jet fuel markets following major disruptions to supply routes. These developments highlight both ESG recognition and changing product demand conditions that may influence future performance assessments. Marathon Petroleum operates as a large U.S. refiner and fuels supplier, so shifts...
